available_tools.description: This API orders a hotel room. Two rooms are ordered if the number of adults is greater than 2. Only one order can be made at same time.
available_tools.name: BookHotel

check_in_time.description: The time to check in. Format: %Y-%m-%d

check_out_time.description: The time to check out. Format: %Y-%m-%d

room_count.description: The number of rooms to order.

normalized_goal_template: can you help me book a hotel room for two adults and one child how about the hilton in san francisco i want to check in on august th and check out on august th just one room for all of us two adults and one child thank you so much how much is the cost
user_goal:
Can you help me book a hotel room for two adults and one child?
How about the Hilton in San Francisco?
I want to check in on August 10th and check out on August 15th.
Just one room for all of us.
Two adults and one child.
Thank you so much! How much is the cost?

available_tools.description: This API provides basic arithmetic operations: addition, subtraction, multiplication, and division.
available_tools.name: Calculator

formula.description: The formula that needs to be calculated. Only integers are supported. Valid operators are +, -, *, /, and (, ). For example, '(1 + 2) * 3'.

available_tools.description: This API generates a caption for a given image.

url.description: The url to download the image. It should end with .jpg, .jpeg or .png.

user_goal:
Can you describe this image for me?
Here it is: http://l7.alamy.com/zooms/278b12a987734ec285da7155397e0d0a/an-airplane-takes-off-from-terminal-1-at-manchester-international-h4b040.jpg

available_tools.description: Sends an email to the user with a link to reset the password. Need call twice, first with 'Forgot Password' status to get the verification code, then call again with 'Verification Code' status to change the password. Must pass the name of the parameters when calling the API, like ForgotPassword(status='Forgot Password', username='username').
available_tools.name: ForgotPassword

email.description: The email of the user. Only needed for the first call.

new_password.description: The new password of the user. Only needed for the second call.

status.description: 'Forgot Password' for first call, after get the verification code, call again with 'Verification Code' to change the password.

username.description: The username of the user. Only needed for the first call.

verification_code.description: The verification code sent to the user. Only needed for the second call.

available_tools.description: This API searches for a given symptom.
available_tools.name: SymptomSearch

results.description: The list of results. Format be like [{"name":possible disease name, "description": disease details},...]

normalized_goal_template: can you help me find information on abdominal pain just general information about abdominal pain and any potential causes or treatments yes please yes that s very helpful thanks

output.description: An inflammation of the stomach lining that can cause abdominal pain, nausea, and other symptoms.
output.name: Gastritis

output.description: A chronic digestive disorder characterized by abdominal pain, bloating, and changes in bowel habits.
output.name: Irritable bowel syndrome

user_goal:
Can you help me find information on abdominal pain?
Just general information about abdominal pain and any potential causes or treatments.
Yes, please.
Yes, that's very helpful. Thanks.
